name: [Insights] Memory Spot Price Update: DRAM Prices Fall across the Board with DDR4 Suffering Larger Drops
snippet: The spot market is still seeing an across-the-board price decline for both DDR4 and DDR5, while DDR4 products are noticeably suffering larger drops.

name: Dynamic random-access memory (DRAM) spot prices are up to a record average of $30.0.
snippet: In fact, average spot prices for 16GB DDR4 are now up +2,352% YoY to $76.9. At the same time, 8GB DDR4 prices surged +1,873% YoY, to $28.9.
